final:
module up_counter_with_load(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [4:0] load_value,
    output reg [4:0] count
    );

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 5'b00000;
        end else if (load) begin
            count <= load_value;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
